parts.raw: Come on $(l.guy), let's go find Coyote.

original_full: Come on $(l.guy), let's go find Coyote.
current: Come on, let's go find Coyote.

parts.raw: Jeez, $(l.guy). Do you really think this is the time?

original_full: Jeez, $(l.guy). Do you really think this is the time?
current: Jeez, man. Do you really think this is the time?

parts.raw: $(l.name)! Can’t you see she’s in pain?

original_full: $(l.name)! Can’t you see she’s in pain?
current: Hey! Can't you see she's in pain?

parts.raw: Watch yourself, little $(l.man). What you want?

original_full: Watch yourself, little $(l.man). What you want?
current: Watch yourself, little man. What you want?

parts.raw: Beauty lies in the eyes of the beholder, $(l.sir).

original_full: Beauty lies in the eyes of the beholder, $(l.sir).
current: Beauty lies in the eyes of the beholder.

parts.raw: Good luck to you, $(l.name). I hope you can find the same justice for your friend that I found for my brother.

original_full: Good luck to you, $(l.name). I hope you can find the same justice for your friend that I found for my brother.
current: Good luck to you. I hope you can find the same justice for your friend that I found for my brother.

parts.raw: After a fashion, yes, $(l.sir). Sergeant in the 31st California Militia. It's no longer a recognized unit, and there are those who would say we never were. But someone had to stand up to the Tir, and it fell to us.

original_full: After a fashion, yes, $(l.sir). Sergeant in the 31st California Militia. It's no longer a recognized unit, and there are those who would say we never were. But someone had to stand up to the Tir, and it fell to us.
current: After a fashion, yes. Sergeant in the 31st California Militia. It's no longer a recognized unit, and there are those who would say we never were. But someone had to stand up to the Tir, and it fell to us.

parts.raw: Yes, $(l.sir). I was in CalFree when the elves came marching down from the north in '36. After the UCAS pulled their support, we had little in the ways of an organized defense. But what we did have was a stockpile of weapons and ammo down in Oakland.

original_full: Yes, $(l.sir). I was in CalFree when the elves came marching down from the north in '36. After the UCAS pulled their support, we had little in the ways of an organized defense. But what we did have was a stockpile of weapons and ammo down in Oakland.
current: Yes. I was in CalFree when the elves came marching down from the north in '36. After the UCAS pulled their support, we had little in the ways of an organized defense. But what we did have was a stockpile of weapons and ammo down in Oakland.

parts.raw: No, $(l.name). I didn't miss a beat. I was on my game the whole time. Remember, I was on point. New Larry was supposed to cover Dowd.

original_full: No, $(l.name). I didn't miss a beat. I was on my game the whole time. Remember, I was on point. New Larry was supposed to cover Dowd.
current: No. I didn't miss a beat. I was on my game the whole time. Remember, I was on point. New Larry was supposed to cover Dowd.

parts.raw: We should choose our friends more carefully, $(l.name).

original_full: We should choose our friends more carefully, $(l.name).
current: We should choose our friends more carefully.

parts.raw:
You were born for this gig, $(l.name). Me... not so much. 

I think I’m gonna hang it up - find a nice brothel somewhere. Stay drunk until I croak.

You were born for this gig, $(l.name). Me... not so much. 

I think I’m gonna hang it up - find a nice brothel somewhere. Stay drunk until I croak.
current: You were born for this gig. Me... not so much. I think I’m gonna hang it up - find a nice brothel somewhere. Stay drunk until I croak.

Better’n me? Sounds easy. Keep in touch, $(l.name). 

Don’t die a stranger.

Better’n me? Sounds easy. Keep in touch, $(l.name). 

Don’t die a stranger.
current: Better’n me? Sounds easy. Keep in touch. Don’t die a stranger.

parts.raw: Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! Are you ready to build a better tomorrow?

original_full: Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! Are you ready to build a better tomorrow?
current: Welcome friend! Are you ready to build a better tomorrow?

parts.raw: Then go right in, $(scene.BroSis)! Someone from the Counseling Center would love to talk with you.

original_full: Then go right in, $(scene.BroSis)! Someone from the Counseling Center would love to talk with you.
current: Then go right in, friend! Someone from the Counseling Center would love to talk with you.

parts.raw: Of course, $(scene.BroSis)! Go right ahead and ask.

original_full: Of course, $(scene.BroSis)! Go right ahead and ask.
current: Of course, friend! Go right ahead and ask.

parts.raw: Yes, $(scene.BroSis)! We don’t try to hide that!

original_full: Yes, $(scene.BroSis)! We don’t try to hide that!
current: Yes, friend! We don’t try to hide that!

parts.raw: That’s because it is, $(scene.BroSis)!

original_full: That’s because it is, $(scene.BroSis)!
current: That’s because it is, friend!

parts.raw: You say that like it’s a bad thing, $(scene.BroSis)!

original_full: You say that like it’s a bad thing, $(scene.BroSis)!
current: You say that like it’s a bad thing, friend!

parts.raw: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it, $(scene.BroSis)?

original_full: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it, $(scene.BroSis)?
current: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it, friend?

parts.raw: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it? $+(l.race_plural) are especially welcome, $(scene.BroSis)!

original_full: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it? $+(l.race_plural) are especially welcome, $(scene.BroSis)!
current: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it? $+(l.race_plural) are especially welcome, friend!

parts.raw: Absolutely, $(scene.BroSis)! In a world as cold as this one, what’s more important than Belonging? I can see you have some questions. Why don’t you ask them?

original_full: Absolutely, $(scene.BroSis)! In a world as cold as this one, what’s more important than Belonging? I can see you have some questions. Why don’t you ask them?
current: Absolutely, friend! In a world as cold as this one, what’s more important than Belonging? I can see you have some questions. Why don’t you ask them?

parts.raw: How can I help you, $(scene.BroSis)?

original_full: How can I help you, $(scene.BroSis)?
current: How can I help you, friend?

parts.raw: Oh, $(scene.BroSis) - I forgot to mention that everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.

original_full: Oh, $(scene.BroSis) - I forgot to mention that everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.
current: Oh, friend - I forgot to mention that everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.

parts.raw:
Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! I hope you are ready to build a better tomorrow!

I’m sorry but we do not allow groups. Everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.

Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! I hope you are ready to build a better tomorrow!

parts.raw: Hey, $(l.guy), have you seen Josie?

original_full: Hey, $(l.guy), have you seen Josie?
current: Hey, man, have you seen Josie?

parts.raw: This $(l.guy) here has... exotic tastes. $+(l.he) wants to help us out and is willing to pay for the privilege. That, and a copy of the recording.

original_full: This $(l.guy) here has... exotic tastes. $+(l.he) wants to help us out and is willing to pay for the privilege. That, and a copy of the recording.
current: Our friend here has... exotic tastes. And wants to help us out, and is willing to pay for the privilege. That, and a copy of the recording.

parts.raw: Haven't seen you before $(l.guy). Lookin' to go somewhere special?

original_full: Haven't seen you before $(l.guy). Lookin' to go somewhere special?
current: Haven't seen you before. Lookin' to go somewhere special?

parts.raw: Listen $(l.guy), I'm too busy for your chit-chat. Buy something or get out.

original_full: Listen $(l.guy), I'm too busy for your chit-chat. Buy something or get out.
current: Listen, I'm too busy for your chit-chat. Buy something or get out.

parts.raw: It’s you! You’re the $(l.man) who helped me escape from the Universal Brotherhood! How did you get here?

original_full: It’s you! You’re the $(l.man) who helped me escape from the Universal Brotherhood! How did you get here?
current: It’s you! You’re the man who helped me escape from the Universal Brotherhood! How did you get here?

parts.raw: Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). You can enter with your Home or Sanctuary access keycard.

original_full: Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). You can enter with your Home or Sanctuary access keycard.
current: Yes, it is friend. You can enter with your Home or Sanctuary access keycard.

parts.raw: Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). I would not expect a new face to have such high clearance already. Your key card will allow you access.

original_full: Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). I would not expect a new face to have such high clearance already. Your key card will allow you access.
current: Yes, it is friend. I would not expect a new face to have such high clearance already. Your key card will allow you access.

parts.raw: I knew you were just lookin' to cause static. Dash, ice this $(l.guy)!

original_full: I knew you were just lookin' to cause static. Dash, ice this $(l.guy)!
current: I knew you were just lookin' to cause static. Dash, ice 'em!

parts.raw: Hey $(l.race) welcome back, you're either up really early or really late.

original_full: Hey $(l.race) welcome back, you're either up really early or really late.
current: Hey, welcome back. You're either up really early or really late.

parts.raw: Hey, I know you. You’re... uh... $(l.Name)! Thanks again for your help back in 2012. What can I do for you today?

original_full: Hey, I know you. You’re... uh... $(l.Name)! Thanks again for your help back in 2012. What can I do for you today?
current: Hey, I know you. You're... uh... that runner! Thanks again for your help back in 2012. What can I do for you today?

parts.raw: Your client is the chalk line? That’s messed up $(l.man), but I respect it, ok, but don’t mess anything up. Not that anyone would likely notice because the forensics aren’t coming back.

original_full: Your client is the chalk line? That’s messed up $(l.man), but I respect it, ok, but don’t mess anything up. Not that anyone would likely notice because the forensics aren’t coming back.
current: Your client is the chalk line? That’s messed up man, but I respect it, ok, but don’t mess anything up. Not that anyone would likely notice because the forensics aren’t coming back.

parts.raw: You ever hear of the Nephilim Network? Of course you have. An in-the-know $(l.guy) like you has to have heard of *the* premier merc team out there.

original_full: You ever hear of the Nephilim Network? Of course you have. An in-the-know $(l.guy) like you has to have heard of *the* premier merc team out there.
current: You ever hear of the Nephilim Network? Of course you have. Someone in-the-know like you has to have heard of THE premier merc team out there.

parts.raw: Attention. $(l.name), please report to the north hall to meet with the administrator.

original_full: Attention. $(l.name), please report to the north hall to meet with the administrator.
current: Attention. Would our new arrival please report to the north hall to meet with the administrator.

parts.raw: Welcome, $(l.sir)! What business brings you to Mercy Mental Hospital?

original_full: Welcome, $(l.sir)! What business brings you to Mercy Mental Hospital?
current: Welcome! What business brings you to Mercy Mental Hospital?

parts.raw: Yes $(scene.BroSis)? What can I do for you?

original_full: Yes $(scene.BroSis)? What can I do for you?
current: Yes friend? What can I do for you?

parts.raw: I didn't think you $(l.guy)s were allowed to have friends outside of the Universal Brotherhood?

original_full: I didn't think you $(l.guy)s were allowed to have friends outside of the Universal Brotherhood?
current: I didn't think you people were allowed to have friends outside of the Universal Brotherhood?

parts.raw: Then yes. YES! I’m $(s.name).

original_full: Then yes. YES! I’m $(s.name).
current: Then yes. YES! That's me. I'm him.

parts.raw: Sure, $(l.name), sure. Whatever you say.

original_full: Sure, $(l.name), sure. Whatever you say.
current: Sure, sure. Whatever you say.

parts.raw: This is correct. You are a smart $(l.guy). What can I do for you, Smart $+(l.guy)?

original_full: This is correct. You are a smart $(l.guy). What can I do for you, Smart $+(l.guy)?
current: This is correct. You are a smart one. What can I do for you, smart one?

parts.raw:
I know the perfect $(scene.BroSis) to speak with you, $(l.he) has a similar background and talks $(scene.TalkAbout). 

You two would get along fabulously, but $(l.he) isn't in today and the rest of my counselor are currently booked.

Could you come back tomorrow?

I know the perfect $(scene.BroSis) to speak with you, $(l.he) has a similar background and talks $(scene.TalkAbout).

current: Oh... thank you! It's just down the street. Please... our livelihoods depend on this market.

parts.raw: I think young Zipper here is just about spent. Now... just give me a moment to hook up a recording rig to our friend here and $(l.he)'ll have quite the BTL for $(l.his) personal collection.

However, I'm sure she would recommend me - IF she was a customer. Which I'm not saying she is.

parts.raw:
Alright, $(l.man). Go down the hall and take a left and you will see the cell, you'll know it when you see it. We have been waiting for that chip, time to make an example out of that slitch. 

Oh and you already brought some zebra meat glad you thought ahead. Shoulda seen what happened to the last guy. The hounds will tear you to pieces without it.
